name: Chongqing Construction Engineering Group Corporation Limited
summary: Chongqing Construction Engineering Group Corporation Limited engages in construction activities in China. The company engages in the construction of buildings, roads, bridges, tunnels, and steel and electromechanical structures; and undertakes rail transit, design, and other businesses. It is also involved in manufacturing construction machinery; providing logistics and distribution, construction finance, and construction project investment management services; and franchising business. The company was formerly known as Chongqing Jiangong Group Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Chongqing Construction Engineering Group Corporation Limited in September 2010. The company was founded in 1998 and is based in Chongqing, China.
